translations.- **_posts/**: Articles are stored in th:
- **_posts/**: Articles are stored in this directory  
  Article file naming convention: `YYYY` – `MM` – `DD` - `article-filename`.md

- **assets/**:  
  Website resource directory. All images used by the site or **images within articles** should be placed here.
translations.- Article file naming convention: `YYYY`:
- Article file naming convention: `YYYY` – `MM` – `DD` - `article-file-name` .md

- It is recommended to use English for file names (for SEO optimization), as this name will be the URL path.
translations.- Rename the file to: `ZMediumToMarkdown:
- Rename the file to: `ZMediumToMarkdown.yml`

- Please provide the Markdown content you want me to translate.
translations.- Repository name: `GithubUsername/Organ:
- Repository name: `GithubUsername/OrganizationName.github.io` ( **Be sure to use this format** )

- Be sure to select the "Public" visibility for the repository.
translations.- Supports Custom Display Styles\n\n- Su:
- Supports Custom Display Styles

- Supports custom page adjustments (e.g., inserting ads, js widgets)

- Support Custom Pages

- Support Custom Domains

- Static pages load quickly and provide a smooth browsing experience

- Using Git version control, all historical versions of the articles can be preserved and restored.

- Fully Automated Scheduled Sync of Medium Articles to Website
translations.- We can first delete all example articl: - We can first delete all example article files under the `_posts/` directory.
translations.- [cron](https://crontab.guru/){:target=:
- [cron](https://crontab.guru/){:target="_blank"}: Set the execution schedule (weekly? monthly? daily?). Here it is set to run automatically at 1:15 AM on the 15th of every month.

- command: Enter your Medium username after -j
translations.- layout: post\n\n- title: Article Title:
- layout: post

- title: Article Title (og:title)

- description: Article description (og:description)

- date: Article publication date (cannot be in the future)

- author: Author (meta:author)

- tags: Tags (multiple allowed)

- categories: Categories (single, separate subcategories with spaces, e.g., `Jekyll Life` means the Life folder under the Jekyll directory)
translations.> *After installing Ruby, [RubyGems](htt: > *After installing Ruby, [RubyGems](https://github.com/rubygems/rubygems){:target="_blank"} should also be installed.
translations.> Also, note that since we are deploying: > Also, note that since we are deploying to GitHub Pages, according to the official documentation, not all themes are supported.
translations.> Alternatively, you can find templates: > Alternatively, you can find templates on Github that can be directly forked (e.g. [al-folio](https://github.com/alshedivat/al-folio){:target="_blank"}) and used right away. If none fit your needs and you have to install a template manually, you will need to figure out how to configure Github Pages deployment yourself. I tried a bit but didn't succeed, so I will update this article with my findings later.
translations.> If you encounter any download issues o: > If you encounter any download issues or unexpected errors, feel free to [contact me](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"}. This downloader was created by me ( [development insights](../ddd88a84e177/) ) and can help you solve problems quickly and directly.
translations.> No manual operation needed at all! Thi: > No manual operation needed at all! This means you can continue updating your Medium articles, and the script will automatically and conveniently sync the content from the cloud to your own website!
translations.> Other templates rarely offer a similar: > Other templates rarely offer a similar one-click installation. For those unfamiliar with Jekyll and GitHub Pages, using this template first is a better way to get started. I will update the article later to cover installation methods for other templates when there is a chance.
translations.> ⚠️ Changes to _config.yml require rest: > ⚠️ Changes to _config.yml require restarting the local site to take effect!
translations.> ⚠️ DNS settings take at least 5 minute: > ⚠️ DNS settings take at least 5 minutes to 72 hours to take effect. If verification keeps failing, please try again later.
translations.> ⚠️ No need to restart the site after e: > ⚠️ No need to restart the site after editing articles. Changes will be rendered and displayed immediately. If updates don’t appear after a while, the article format might be incorrect, causing rendering failure. Check the Terminal for error details.
translations.Actions -> ZMediumToMarkdown -> Run work: Actions -> ZMediumToMarkdown -> Run workflow -> Run workflow.
translations.Jeklly 使用 [Liquid](https://jekyllrb.com/: Jekyll uses [Liquid](https://jekyllrb.com/docs/liquid/){:target="_blank"} as its page template engine. Page templates are composed in a way similar to inheritance:
translations.MacOS 雖自帶 Ruby 但建議使用 rbenv 安裝另一個 Ruby 與系: MacOS comes with Ruby pre-installed, but it is recommended to use rbenv to install a separate Ruby version to keep it isolated from the system Ruby. Enter the above command in Terminal to install rbenv.
translations.Push 完成後回到 Github 上，可以看到 Actions 有 CD 再跑: After the push is complete, return to GitHub and you can see the Actions running the CD again:

translations.[ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/Z: [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"} also offers a convenient [Github Action feature](https://github.com/marketplace/actions/zmediumtomarkdown-automatic-bot){:target="_blank"}, allowing you to free your computer and automatically sync Medium articles to your website.

translations.```markdown\n---\nlayout: post\ntitle::
```markdown
---
layout: post
title:  "Hello"
description: ZhgChgLi's first article
date:   2022-07-16 10:03:36 +0800
categories: Jeklly Life
author: ZhgChgLi
tags: [ios]
---
# HiHi!
Hello there
I am **ZhgChgLi**
Image:
![](/assets/post_images/DSC_2297.jpg)
> _If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact)._
```

```markdown
---
layout: post
title:  "Hello"
description: ZhgChgLi's first article
date:   2022-07-16 10:03:36 +0800
categories: Jeklly Life
author: ZhgChgLi
tags: [ios]
---
```
translations.```yaml\n# The Site Configuration\n\n# I:
```yaml
# The Site Configuration

# Import the theme
theme: jekyll-theme-chirpy

# Change the following value to '/PROJECT_NAME' ONLY IF your site type is GitHub Pages Project sites
# and doesn't have a custom domain.
# baseurl: ''

# The language of the webpage › http://www.lingoes.net/en/translator/langcode.htm
# If it has the same name as one of the files in folder `_data/locales`, the layout language will also be changed,
# otherwise, the layout language will use the default value of 'en'.
lang: en

# Additional parameters for datetime localization, optional. › https://github.com/iamkun/dayjs/tree/dev/src/locale
prefer_datetime_locale:

# Change to your timezone › http://www.timezoneconverter.com/cgi-bin/findzone/findzone
timezone:

# jekyll-seo-tag settings › https://github.com/jekyll/jekyll-seo-tag/blob/master/docs/usage.md
# ↓ --------------------------

title: ZhgChgLi                          # the main title

tagline: Live a life you will remember.   # it will display as the sub-title

description: >-                        # used by seo meta and the atom feed
    ZhgChgLi iOS Developer eager to learn, teaching and learning together, loves movies/TV series/classical music/sports/life

# fill in the protocol & hostname for your site, e.g., 'https://username.github.io'
url: 'https://zhgchg.li'

github:
  username: ZhgChgLi             # change to your github username

twitter:
  username: zhgchgli            # change to your twitter username

social:
  # Change to your full name.
  # It will be displayed as the default author of the posts and the copyright owner in the Footer
  name: ZhgChgLi
  email: zhgchgli@gmail.com             # change to your email address
  links:
    - https://medium.com/@zhgchgli
    - https://github.com/ZhgChgLi
    - https://www.linkedin.com/in/zhgchgli

google_site_verification:               # fill in your verification string

# ↑ --------------------------
# The end of `jekyll-seo-tag` settings

google_analytics:
  id: G-6WZJENT8WR                 # fill in your Google Analytics ID
  # Google Analytics pageviews report settings
  pv:
    proxy_endpoint:   # fill in the Google Analytics superProxy endpoint of Google App Engine
    cache_path:       # the local PV cache data, friendly to visitors from GFW region

# Prefer color scheme setting.
#
# Note: Keep empty will follow the system prefer color by default,
# and there will be a toggle to switch the theme between dark and light
# on the bottom left of the sidebar.
#
# Available options:
#
#     light  - Use the light color scheme
#     dark   - Use the dark color scheme
#
theme_mode:   # [light|dark]

# The CDN endpoint for images.
# Notice that once it is assigned, the CDN url
# will be added to all image (site avatar & posts' images) paths starting with '/'
#
# e.g. 'https://cdn.com'
img_cdn:

# the avatar on sidebar, support local or CORS resources
avatar: '/assets/images/zhgchgli.jpg'

# boolean type, the global switch for ToC in posts.
toc: true

comments:
  active: disqus        # The global switch for posts comments, e.g., 'disqus'.  Keep it empty means disable
  # The active options are as follows:
  disqus:
    shortname: zhgchgli    # fill with the Disqus shortname. › https://help.disqus.com/en/articles/1717111-what-s-a-shortname
  # utterances settings › https://utteranc.es/
  utterances:
    repo:         # <gh-username>/<repo>
    issue_term:   # < url | pathname | title | ...>
  # Giscus options › https://giscus.app
  giscus:
    repo:             # <gh-username>/<repo>
    repo_id:
    category:
    category_id:
    mapping:          # optional, default to 'pathname'
    input_position:   # optional, default to 'bottom'
    lang:             # optional, default to the value of `site.lang`

# Self-hosted static assets, optional › https://github.com/cotes2020/chirpy-static-assets
assets:
  self_host:
    enabled:      # boolean, keep empty means false
    # specify the Jekyll environment, empty means both
    # only works if `assets.self_host.enabled` is 'true'
    env:          # [development|production]

paginate: 10

# ------------ The following options are not recommended to be modified ------------------

kramdown:
  syntax_highlighter: rouge
  syntax_highlighter_opts:   # Rouge Options › https://github.com/jneen/rouge#full-options
    css_class: highlight
    # default_lang: console
    span:
      line_numbers: false
    block:
      line_numbers: true
      start_line: 1

collections:
  tabs:
    output: true
    sort_by: order

defaults:
  - scope:
      path: ''          # An empty string here means all files in the project
      type: posts
    values:
      layout: post
      comments: true    # Enable comments in posts.
      toc: true         # Display TOC column in posts.
      # DO NOT modify the following parameter unless you are confident enough
      # to update the code of all other post links in this project.
      permalink: /posts/:title/
  - scope:
      path: _drafts
    values:
      comments: false
  - scope:
      path: ''
      type: tabs             # see `site.collections`
    values:
      layout: page
      permalink: /:title/
  - scope:
      path: assets/img/favicons
    values:
      swcache: true
  - scope:
      path: assets/js/dist
    values:
      swcache: true

sass:
  style: compressed

compress_html:
  clippings: all
  comments: all
  endings: all
  profile: false
  blanklines: false
  ignore:
    envs: [development]

exclude:
  - '*.gem'
  - '*.gemspec'
  - tools
  - README.md
  - LICENSE
  - gulpfile.js
  - node_modules
  - package*.json

jekyll-archives:
  enabled: [categories, tags]
  layouts:
    category: category
    tag: tag
  permalinks:
    tag: /tags/:name/
    category: /categories/:name/
```
translations.```yaml\nname: ZMediumToMarkdown\non:\n:
```yaml
name: ZMediumToMarkdown
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: "10 1 15 * *" # At 01:10 on day-of-month 15.

jobs:
  ZMediumToMarkdown:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: ZMediumToMarkdown Automatic Bot
      uses: ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown@main
      with:
        command: '-j your Medium username'
```
translations.categories: 分類 (單個，用空格區分子母分類 `Jeklly Lif: categories: Categories (single, separate subcategories with spaces, e.g., `Jekyll Life` means the Life folder under the Jekyll directory)
translations.cd 到 blog 目錄下後，下以下指令將 Medium 上的該使用者所有文章都: After cd into the blog directory, run the following command to download all articles of that user from Medium:

translations.date: 文章發表時間 (不可以是未來)\n: date: Article publication date (cannot be in the future)
translations.git clone 剛剛建立的 Repo。\n\n: git clone the newly created Repo.
translations.⚠️ DNS 設定至少需要 5 分鐘 ~ 72 小時才會生效，如果一直無法認證過: ⚠️ DNS settings take at least 5 minutes to 72 hours to take effect. If verification keeps failing, please try again later.
translations.⚠️ _config.yml 有調整都需要重新啟動本地網站！才會套用效果\n\n: ⚠️ Changes to _config.yml require restarting the local site to take effect!
translations.⚠️ 文章調整不需要重新啟動網站，檔案變更後會直接渲染顯示，如果過一陣子都沒出現: ⚠️ No need to restart the site after editing articles. Changes will be rendered and displayed immediately. If updates don’t appear after a while, the article format might be incorrect, causing rendering failure. Check the Terminal for error details.
translations.「Save」後不會馬上生效，要回到「Actions」頁面再一次重新等待部署。\n: After clicking "Save," the changes won't take effect immediately. You need to go back to the "Actions" page and wait for the deployment again.
translations.下載完成後，回到本地網站就能預覽成果囉。\n\n: After downloading, you can preview the results on your local website.
translations.使用 Git 版本控制，文章所有的歷史版本都能保留恢復\n: Using Git version control, all historical versions of the articles can be preserved and restored.
translations.使用 Markdown 格式寫作，可以讓文章兼容更多不同平台；如不習慣，也可以找: Writing in Markdown format allows your articles to be compatible with more platforms; if you're not used to it, you can also find online or offline Markdown editors to get the same experience as writing directly on Medium!
translations.使用 [Visual Code](https://code.visualstud: Use [Visual Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/){:target="_blank"} (free) or [Typora](https://typora.io/){:target="_blank"} (paid) to create Markdown files. Here, we use [Visual Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/){:target="_blank"} as an example:
translations.使用者可自由客製化頁面，引擎會先看使用者有沒有建立對應頁面的客製化檔案 -> 如: Users can freely customize pages. The engine first checks if the user has created a custom file for the page -> if not, it checks the template -> if still not, it displays using the original Jekyll style.

translations.全自動定時自動同步 Medium 文章到網站\n: Fully Automated Scheduled Sync of Medium Articles to Website
translations.其他模版比較少有提供類似的一鍵安裝，在不熟悉 Jeklly、Github Pag: Other templates rarely offer a similar one-click installation. For those unfamiliar with Jekyll and GitHub Pages, using this template first is a better way to get started. I will update the article later to cover installation methods for other templates when there is a chance.

translations.另外在 Github 上找可以直接 Fork 的模版也可以(e.g. [al-f: Alternatively, you can find templates on Github that can be directly forked (e.g. [al-folio](https://github.com/alshedivat/al-folio){:target="_blank"}) and used right away. translations.執行後，ZMediumToMarkdown 就會直接透過 Github Acti: After running, ZMediumToMarkdown will directly use the GitHub Action runner to sync Medium articles to the Repo with the script:
If you encounter any download issues or unexpected errors, feel free to [contact me](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"}. This downloader was created by me ( [development insights](../ddd88a84e177/) ) and can help you solve problems quickly and directly.
translations.如果不喜歡 [zhgchgli0718.github.io](https://z: If you don't like the GitHub URL [zhgchgli0718.github.io](https://zhgchgli0718.github.io/){:target="_blank"}, you can buy a domain you like from [Namecheap](https://namecheap.pxf.io/P0jdZQ){:target="_blank"} or register a free .tk domain using [Dot.tk](http://dot.tk/en/index.html?lang=en){:target="_blank"}.
translations.安裝方式一般使用 [gem-based themes](https://jeky: The installation method generally uses [gem-based themes](https://jekyllrb.com/docs/themes/#installing-a-theme){:target="_blank"}, while some Repos offer installation via Fork; some even provide one-click installation. In short, each theme may have a different installation method, so please refer to the theme's documentation for usage.
translations.完全無需人工操作！也就是說未來你還是可以繼續更新 Medium 文章，腳本都會貼: No manual operation needed at all! This means you can continue updating your Medium articles, and the script will automatically and conveniently sync the content from the cloud to your own website!
translations.將 Medium 內容搬遷至 Github Pages (with Jekyll: Migrating Medium Content to Github Pages (with Jekyll/Chirpy)
translations.建立完成後回到 Actions 就會出現 ZMediumToMarkdown A: After creation, the ZMediumToMarkdown Action will appear in Actions.
translations.建議以英文為檔案名稱 (SEO 最佳化)，這個名稱就會是網址的路徑\n: It is recommended to use English for file names (for SEO optimization), as this name will be the URL path.
translations.我們可以先把 `_posts/` 目錄下的範例文章檔案全數刪除。\n: We can first delete all example article files under the `_posts/` directory.
translations.我們可以再開一個新的 Termnial 做後續的其他操作。\n\n: We can open a new Terminal for other subsequent operations.
translations.所以我們可以很輕易地對任何頁面做客製化，只需要在相對應的目錄建立一樣的檔案名稱即: So we can easily customize any page by simply creating a file with the same name in the corresponding directory!
translations.打開 `_config.yml` 設定檔案進行設定：\n\n: Open the `_config.yml` configuration file to set up:
translations.支援客製化頁面調整 (e.g. 插入廣告、js widget)\n: Supports custom page adjustments (e.g., inserting ads, js widgets)
translations.最終還是走回自架的的道路，不同的是採用的並非動態網站(e.g. wordpres: In the end, I still chose to self-host, but instead of using a dynamic website (e.g., WordPress), I opted for a static site. Although it supports fewer features, all I need is the ability to write articles and a clean, smooth, customizable browsing experience—nothing else!
translations.有了基本的 Jekyll 知識後我們繼續向前邁進，使用 [ZMediumToMa: With basic Jekyll knowledge, we move forward by using the [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"} tool to download existing articles from the Medium website and convert them into Markdown format, placing them into our Blog folder.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本地預覽內容沒問題後，我們就要將內容 Push 到 Github Repo 囉。: After confirming the local preview looks good, we can push the content to the GitHub Repo.
translations.檔案內容如下：\n: Please provide the Markdown content you want me to translate.
translations.此 Terminal 開著，本地網站就開著，Terminal 會持續更新網站存取: As long as this Terminal is open, the local website will be running. The Terminal will continuously update the website access logs, making it easier for us to debug.
translations.每次 Push 內容到 Repo 都會觸發重新部署，要等到部署成功，更改才會真正: Every time content is pushed to the Repo, it triggers a redeployment. You need to wait for the deployment to succeed before changes take effect.
translations.每次有新文章都要用電腦手動跑 [ZMediumToMarkdown](https: Every time there is a new article, you have to manually run [ZMediumToMarkdown](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZMediumToMarkdown){:target="_blank"} on your computer and then push it to the project. Sounds troublesome?
translations.現在你也擁有一個免費的 Jekyll 個人 Blog 囉！！\n\n: Now you also have a free Jekyll personal blog!!
translations.等待 DNS 通了之後，就可以用 zhgchg.li 取代掉原本的 github: After the DNS is set up, you can use zhgchg.li to replace the original github.io URL.
translations.等待所有文章下載完成。。。\n\n: Waiting for all articles to finish downloading...
translations.經營 Medium 的第四年，已累積超過 65 篇文章，將近 1000+ 小時的: In my fourth year of running Medium, I have accumulated over 65 articles and nearly 1000+ hours of effort. I initially chose Medium because it was simple and convenient, allowing me to focus on writing without worrying about other issues. Before that, I tried self-hosting WordPress, but I spent most of my time dealing with the environment, styles, and plugins. No matter how I adjusted it, I was never satisfied. After fixing those issues, I found the loading speed too slow, the reading experience poor, and the backend writing interface not user-friendly, so I stopped updating it.
translations.綜合以上，這個方案可以達成我希望流暢的瀏覽體驗及方便的撰寫界面兩個維度的需求。\: In summary, this solution meets my needs for both a smooth browsing experience and a convenient writing interface.
translations.網域後台新增好設定後，回到 Github Repo Settings：\n\n: After adding and configuring the domain in the domain backend, return to the GitHub Repo Settings:
translations.複製其中的網址 `http://127.0.0.1:4000/` 貼到瀏覽器打開: Copy the URL `http://127.0.0.1:4000/` and open it in your browser.
translations.請依照註解將設定替換成您的內容。\n\n: Please replace the settings with your own content as indicated in the comments.
translations.購買網域後進到網域後台：\n\n: After purchasing a domain, go to the domain management dashboard:
translations.跑完後同樣會觸發重新部署，重新部署完成後到網站就會出現最新的內容了。🚀\n\n: After running, it will also trigger a redeployment. Once redeployment is complete, the latest content will appear on the website. 🚀
translations.這邊只以我的環境為例，其他作業系統版本請 [Google 如何安裝 Ruby](: Here I only use my own environment as an example. For other operating systems and versions, please [Google how to install Ruby](https://jekyllrb.com/docs/installation/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.這邊就以我 Blog 採用的模版 [Chirpy](https://github: Here, I use the template [Chirpy](https://github.com/cotes2020/jekyll-theme-chirpy/){:target="_blank"} adopted by my blog as an example. This template offers the simplest one-click installation method and can be used directly.
translations.重新部署完成後，就能成功進入網站了：\n\n: After redeployment, you can successfully access the website:
translations.除了時間到自動執行外還可以依照以下步驟，手動觸發執行：\n\n: Besides automatic execution at scheduled times, you can also manually trigger execution by following these steps:
translations.隨著在 Medium 撰寫的文章越來越多、累積了一些流量與追蹤者後，又開始想自己: As I wrote more articles on Medium and gained some traffic and followers, I wanted to take control of my work instead of relying on a third-party platform (e.g., losing everything if Medium shuts down). So, since the year before last, I have been looking for a secondary backup website. I continue to maintain Medium but also publish content on a site I control. The solution I found back then was — [Google Site](../724a7fb9a364/) — but honestly, it can only serve as a personal "portal." Its writing interface is limited and can't fully migrate all my articles.
translations.靜態化頁面載入快速、瀏覽體驗佳\n: Static pages load quickly and provide a smooth browsing experience
translations.靜態網站的工作流程是：在本地使用 Markdown 格式撰寫好文章，然後將其透過: The workflow of a static website is: write articles locally in Markdown format, then convert them into static web pages using a static site generator and upload them to the server; done. Static web pages offer a fast browsing experience!
translations.預設的 Jekyll Blog 樣式非常簡潔，我們可以從以下網站找到自己喜歡的樣: The default Jekyll blog style is very simple. You can find styles you like from the following websites and apply them:
translations.首次部署完成要更改以下設定：\n\n: After the first deployment, change the following settings:
translations.點擊右上方「Start commit」->「Commit new file」\n: Click the top right "Start commit" -> "Commit new file"
